name: CLX - MGA Insurance Review Video Engagement Tracker v1

nodes.name: Webhook
nodes.notes: DEACTIVATED. Public POST. Triggered by landing page tracking JS (existing video pipeline) when a review video gets engagement. Updates policy_reviews.video_engagement_status (viewed / replied / meeting_booked) based on event_type. Also writes through to existing video_engagement table from commit 25c0886.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ vertical_id: 'insurance', event_type: 'review_video_engagement', client_id: $('Decide Status').item.json.client_id, advisor_id: $('Decide Status').item.json.advisor_id, performed_by_user_id: null, performed_by_role: 'agent', event_data: { policy_review_id: $('Decide Status').item.json.policy_review_id, video_render_id: $('Decide Status').item.json.video_render_id, engagement_event: $('Decide Status').item.json.event_type, new_status: $('Decide Status').item.json.new_status }, occurred_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ ok: true, vertical_id: 'insurance', new_status: $('Decide Status').item.json.new_status }) }}
